name: Phishing Email Investigation & Response
description: Automated investigation and response workflow for reported phishing emails. Extracts IOCs, checks URL and sender reputation against threat intelligence feeds, and takes containment actions including sender blocking and email purging.

step--extract-metadata.name: Extract Email Metadata
step--extract-metadata.description: Parse the reported email to extract sender, subject, headers, and body content.

commands.command: Extract email headers, sender address, subject line, and body content from the reported phishing email.

step--extract-iocs.name: Extract IOCs
step--extract-iocs.description: Identify and extract all indicators of compromise from the email body and attachments.

commands.command: Extract URLs, IP addresses, domain names, and file hashes from the email content and attachments.

step--check-url-reputation.name: Check URL Reputation
step--check-url-reputation.description: Query threat intelligence platforms to check reputation of extracted URLs.

commands.command: Submit extracted URLs to VirusTotal and URLhaus for reputation scoring.

step--check-sender.name: Check Sender Reputation
step--check-sender.description: Verify the sender address against known malicious sender databases.

commands.command: Check sender address against internal blocklist and external threat feeds.

step--is-malicious.name: Is Email Malicious?
step--is-malicious.description: Evaluate gathered intelligence to determine if the email is malicious.

step--block-sender.name: Block Sender Domain
step--block-sender.description: Add the sender's domain to the email gateway blocklist.

commands.command: Add sender domain to Exchange Online / email gateway blocklist.

step--search-recipients.name: Search for Other Recipients
step--search-recipients.description: Search mail logs to identify other employees who received the same phishing email.

commands.command: Query email logs for messages from the same sender with matching subject line.

step--delete-emails.name: Delete Phishing Emails
step--delete-emails.description: Purge all instances of the phishing email from user mailboxes.

commands.command: Execute compliance search and purge action to remove phishing emails from all mailboxes.

step--update-case-benign.name: Update Case - Benign
step--update-case-benign.description: Mark the case as benign and notify the reporter.

commands.command: Update case status to 'Benign' and send notification to the original reporter.
